description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Submit a website redesign quote request for 12 pages with an $8,000 budget
tasks.description: Navigate to the web design services, open the custom quote form, and submit a quote request specifying a website redesign with 12 pages, an exact budget of $8,000, and a timeline of within 3 months, including contact information.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Services" link in the main navigation.
In the services menu, click the "Web Design & Development" option.
On the Web Design & Development page, scroll until you find the website redesign section and click the "Get a custom quote" button.
In the project type dropdown on the quote form, select "Website redesign".
In the "Approximate number of pages" field, type "12", and in the "Exact budget" field, type "8000".
In the project timeline dropdown, select the option labeled "Within 3 months".
In the contact information fields, enter the name "Alex Rivera", the email "alex@example.com", and the phone number "555-0101".
Click the "Submit quote request" button at the bottom of the form.

tasks.name: Choose the cheapest monthly maintenance plan with at least 10 support hours and start onboarding
tasks.description: Find the maintenance/care plans, filter to monthly billing, identify the plan that offers at least 10 support hours per month at the lowest monthly price, and start the onboarding request with company details and preferred start date.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Services" link in the main navigation.
On the services page, click the "Care & Maintenance" option.
On the Care & Maintenance page, click the "View full plan comparison" button near the pricing section.
In the billing frequency filter above the comparison table, click "Monthly" to show only monthly plans.
Scroll through the comparison table until at least three different monthly plans are visible on the screen.
Among the visible plans, locate the plan that lists 10 or more support hours per month and has the lowest monthly price, then click its "Select plan" button.
On the selected plan's signup page, in the "Company name" field, type "Bright Side Studio".
In the "Preferred start date" date picker, select the 1st day of next month from the calendar.
In the "Primary website URL" field, type "https://example-client.com".
Click the "Request onboarding" button to submit the onboarding request for that maintenance plan.

tasks.name: Save an ecommerce case study with at least 20% conversion uplift to the shortlist
tasks.description: Go to the case studies, filter for ecommerce projects, sort by conversion uplift, open the first project showing a conversion rate increase of at least 20%, add it to the shortlist, and open it again from the shortlist page.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Work" or "Case Studies" link in the main navigation.
On the case studies or portfolio page, open the industry filter and select "Ecommerce".
Open the sort dropdown and select "Conversion uplift — High to Low".
Scroll down the project grid until you see at least one project card that mentions a "Conversion rate increase" of 20% or higher in its summary text.
Click the title of the first project card you see that mentions a conversion rate increase of at least 20%.
On that case study page, click the "Add to shortlist" button.
In the site header, click the "Shortlist" icon or link to open the shortlist page.
On the shortlist page, click the saved case study's title to open it from your shortlist.

tasks.name: Save a 2023 UX article about SaaS onboarding to the reading list and reopen it
tasks.description: Search the blog for SaaS onboarding content, filter the results to the year 2023, select the first article tagged with UX and a minimum 5-minute read time, save it to the reading list, open the reading list, and reopen the article from there.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Blog" or "Insights" link in the main navigation.
On the blog page, click the search field, type "SaaS onboarding", and press Enter or click the search icon.
In the filters area, open the "Year" filter and select "2023".
Open the sort dropdown and choose "Newest first".
Scroll through the search results and find the first article that has a "UX" or "User Experience" tag and shows an estimated read time of at least 5 minutes, then click its title.
On the article detail page, click the "Save to reading list" button.
In the site header, click the "Reading list" or bookmark icon to open the saved articles page.
On the reading list page, locate the saved SaaS onboarding article and click its title to open it.
After the article opens from the reading list, scroll roughly halfway down the page.

tasks.name: Create and save a mobile app + website project estimate that stays at or under $25,000
tasks.description: Use the project estimator to configure a project that includes both a mobile app and a marketing website, adjust feature tiers so the total estimated cost is $25,000 or less, set the target budget to $25,000, and save the estimate using the on-site save function (not email).
steps: From the homepage, click the "Project Estimator" link in the main navigation.
On the estimator page, in the "Project types" section, check both the "Mobile app" and "Marketing website" options.
In the "Design complexity" options, select the "Standard" tier.
In the "Integrations" options, select the "Up to 3 integrations" tier.
In the "Analytics & tracking" options, select the "Basic analytics" tier.
In the "Content creation" options, select the lowest-cost option that still includes copywriting for at least 5 pages.

If the estimator's total cost indicator shows a value greater than $25,000, change the "Integrations" option to the next cheaper tier, and if it is still above $25,000 also change the "Design complexity" option to the next cheaper tier, repeating these adjustments until the displayed total is $25,000 or less.
In the "Target budget" input field, type "25000".
In the contact section, enter the name "Jordan Kim" and the email "jordan@example.com", then click the "Save estimate" button (not any button that emails the estimate).

tasks.name: Book a 30-minute discovery call on a Wednesday morning using the on-site scheduler
tasks.description: Open the contact scheduler, select UTC time zone, choose any Wednesday in the current month, pick the earliest available 30-minute slot between 9:00 and 11:00 AM, and confirm the booking with basic contact details and topic selection.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Contact" link in the main navigation.
On the contact page, click the "Book a discovery call" button.
In the scheduler's time zone dropdown, select "UTC" (or "GMT" if UTC is not listed).
In the scheduler calendar, navigate to the current month if necessary and click on any Wednesday date.
From the list of available time slots for that Wednesday, select the earliest 30-minute slot that starts between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM.
In the booking form, type the name "Taylor Morgan", the email "taylor@example.com", and the company "Northwind Apps".
In the "What would you like to discuss?" dropdown, select "New product design".
Click the "Confirm booking" button to finalize the discovery call.

tasks.name: Configure an hourly UX research engagement under $200/hour for up to 80 hours and send an inquiry
tasks.description: Open the UX Research & Testing service page, switch to hourly pricing, set the engagement to around 80 hours, select any option that yields an hourly rate under $200, and send an inquiry mentioning the 80-hour need and sub-$200/hour rate.
steps: From the homepage, open the "Services" menu and click the "UX Research & Testing" option.
On the UX Research & Testing page, locate the pricing section and click the "Hourly" tab or toggle to switch from project-based pricing to hourly pricing.
In the "Estimated hours" slider or dropdown, set the value to "80 hours" or the closest available option under 100 hours.
If there is a commitment or discount option that affects the hourly rate, select the option that results in an hourly rate under $200 per hour (for example, a "60+ hours" commitment option).
Click the "Talk to us about this plan" or similarly labeled button next to the hourly pricing.
In the inquiry form, open the "Subject" dropdown and select "UX research hourly engagement".
In the message text area, type "We are looking for up to 80 hours of UX research support at your hourly rate under $200/hour."
In the contact fields, enter the name "Riley Chen" and the email "riley@example.com".
Click the "Send inquiry" button to submit the hourly UX research request.

tasks.name: Select a branding package under $5,000 with at least 3 logo concepts and brand guidelines and start onboarding
tasks.description: View and compare branding packages, identify the cheapest package under $5,000 that includes at least 3 logo concepts and a brand guidelines document, configure it with one-time payment and no add-ons, and start the onboarding form with specific company details and launch date.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Services" link and then select "Branding & Visual Identity".
On the Branding & Visual Identity page, scroll to the pricing section and click the "Compare packages" button.

In the comparison table, look across the listed packages and identify which ones include at least "3 logo concepts" and a "Brand guidelines document", then click the "View details" button for the qualifying package that has the lowest price under $5,000.
On the selected package details page, ensure the "One-time payment" billing option is active by clicking the "One-time" option if a different billing option is currently selected.
In the "Add-ons" section, uncheck all add-on checkboxes so that no optional extras are selected.
Click the "Get started with this package" button.
In the onboarding form, type "Aurora Labs" in the "Company name" field.
In the "Industry" dropdown, select "Technology".
In the "Planned brand launch date" field, use the date picker to choose "October 1, 2026", then click the "Continue to summary" button.
